patterns.name: Seat-Based Expansion
patterns.risk: Low utilization → downsizing at renewal. If only buyer uses it, one champion departure = churn.

patterns.name: Usage-Based Expansion
patterns.expansion_model: Pay per consumption (API calls, storage, compute)
patterns.architecture_cost: CRITICAL — marginal cost must approach zero. Cloud cost per unit IS the margin.
patterns.risk: Revenue unpredictability. Economic downturns compress usage. Architecture inefficiency kills margin.

patterns.name: Tiered Upgrade
patterns.risk: If feature gap between tiers is cosmetic, upgrade rates stall. Requires constant feature innovation at higher tiers.

patterns.name: No Expansion Model
patterns.investor_signal: Weak (no growth flywheel, LTV has hard ceiling)
patterns.risk: Every cohort flatlines. Growth ONLY from new customer acquisition. CAC dependency is lethal.
